steps.title: State the shared habitat
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize a similarity between Artemia franciscana and Achromobacter. The notes give one relevant shared trait: both live in the southern portion of the Great Salt Lake.

steps.title: Reject incomplete comparisons
steps.content: Choice A mentions only Artemia franciscana, so it cannot show a similarity. Choice B mentions only Achromobacter, so it has the same problem. Choice C describes the lake but does not connect the two organisms. The answer is D.
